notes: Bug is in WinUI view layer: AngleSwapChainPanel.OnLoaded → GlesContext.CreateSurface → PropertySetExtensions.AddSingle triggers TypeInitializationException with COMException 'Element not found' during WinRT class activation. This code path is exclusive to Windows WinUI runtime — console apps do not use WinRT activation, ANGLE, or PropertySetExtensions. Tested core SkiaSharp on macOS console with both 3.119.1 and 3.119.2; basic rendering works correctly. Docker cannot help as WinRT activation requires Windows. Requires Windows host with WinUI/Windows App SDK to reproduce the ANGLE surface creation failure.

reproductionSteps.description: Create console project with SkiaSharp 3.119.1 (console fallback — WinUI not available on macOS)
reproductionSteps.command: dotnet new console -n Repro --framework net8.0 && cd Repro && dotnet add package SkiaSharp --version 3.119.1

filesCreated.description: Console app testing core SkiaSharp rendering (cannot test WinUI ANGLE path)

reproductionSteps.description: Build and run console app with SkiaSharp 3.119.1 — tests core rendering (cannot test WinUI path)
reproductionSteps.output:
Build succeeded. 0 Warning(s) 0 Error(s)

Center pixel: R=255, G=0, B=0, A=255
SUCCESS: Core SkiaSharp rendering works correctly

reproductionSteps.description: Test with latest SkiaSharp 3.119.2 in fresh project directory
reproductionSteps.command: cd /tmp/skiasharp/repro/3440 && dotnet new console -n Repro-latest --framework net8.0 && cd Repro-latest && dotnet add package SkiaSharp --version 3.119.2 && dotnet build && dotnet run
reproductionSteps.output:

versionResults.notes: Core SkiaSharp works on macOS console, but the reported bug is in WinUI ANGLE path (PropertySetExtensions WinRT activation) which cannot be triggered without Windows + WinUI runtime
Same as 3.119.1 — core rendering works but WinUI view layer untestable on macOS

blockers: Requires Windows host — bug is in WinUI ANGLE/OpenGL rendering path (PropertySetExtensions WinRT activation), not reproducible via console or Docker
WinRT class activation (BaseActivationFactory) only runs on Windows with Windows App SDK runtime
Console fallback tested on macOS: core SkiaSharp rendering works, but cannot trigger AngleSwapChainPanel/GlesContext code path
